question: Did the Royal Air Force fight in the Boxer Rebellion?
context: The Boxer Rebellion took place from 1899–1901
The Royal Air Force was formed on 1 April 1918
response:
<reasoning>
The Boxer Rebellion occurred from 1899 to 1901.
The Royal Air Force was established on 1 April 1918.
The Royal Air Force did not exist during the time of the Boxer Rebellion.
The Royal Air Force did not fight in the Boxer Rebellion.
<answer> No
